parameters.text:
={{ 'Analyze this input and call the appropriate tools.
request_id: ' + $json.request_id + '
has_text: ' + $json.has_text + '
has_images: ' + $json.has_images + '
text: ' + ($json.text || 'none') + '
images_count: ' + ($json.images || []).length }}

options.systemMessage:
You are an orchestration agent.
You MUST decide which tools to call:
- If has_images is true -> call call_vision_tool
- If has_text is true -> call call_text_tool
- Always call call_report_tool last.
Never invent detections or classifications. Use tool outputs only.
Return the final report JSON from the report tool as your response.

OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS:
- Return the JSON from call_report_tool exactly as received.
- If a tool fails, note it but continue with the other tools.

parameters.name: call_vision_tool
parameters.description: Analyze images for object detection. Call this tool when has_images is true. Returns detected objects with labels and confidence scores.

parameters.name: call_text_tool
parameters.description: Classify text content. Call this tool when has_text is true. Returns a classification label and confidence score.

parameters.name: call_report_tool
parameters.description: Generate the final analysis report. ALWAYS call this tool LAST, after vision and text tools. It produces the final structured JSON report.
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ request_id: $('NormalizeInput').first().json.request_id, original_input: { text: $('NormalizeInput').first().json.text, images: $('NormalizeInput').first().json.images, task_type: $('NormalizeInput').first().json.task_type }, vision_result: null, text_result: null, trace: [] }) }}
